gloss_record.canonical_gloss: Tangent: A Tangent is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule.

gloss_record.pedagogical_form: Think of tangent as a Tangent is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule.
gloss_record.expert_form: Tangent denotes a Tangent is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule.
gloss_record.document_role_form: In a mathematical document, tangent usually signals a function concept with provenance from OntoMathPRO; OpenMath; OntoMathEdu.
gloss_record.accessibility_note: Potential ambiguity: trig tangent vs tangent line OpenMath Official transc1 Content Dictionary includes tan as the tangent function; selected as canonical source instead of unrelated OntoMathPRO matches such as Tangent geometry Exact OpenMath function-symbol match found Confirmed mapped in seed ontology with canonical OpenMath link.

gloss_record.pedagogical_form: Think of variable as a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.expert_form: Variable denotes a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.document_role_form: In a mathematical document, variable usually signals a scalar concept with provenance from OntoMathPRO; MathModDB.
gloss_record.accessibility_note: Mathematical role in expressions and models; exact IRIs still need to be recorded MathModDB contains DecisionVariable as a variable-related source IRI; selected as provisional source IRI for Variable because no clean general Variable class was found in the available seed sources Provisional specialized mapping; review later if a general Variable source IRI is found Confirmed mapped in seed ontology with canonical MathModDB link. Variable is retained as a provisional or specialized mapping where the source ontology evidence may not be a clean general-purpose concept match.

speech_text: LaTeX expression: \tan(x) = \frac{\sin(x)}{\cos(x)}. Think of tangent as a Tangent is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule. Think of variable as a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse. Think of equality as an Equality is a mathematical relation that specifies how two or more mathematical objects are connected. Think of division as a Division is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result. Think of sine as a Sine is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule. Think of cosine as a Cosine is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule.
